def negative_threading_thread_without_daemon_true_in_server_code():
    rule_id = "threading_thread_without_daemon_true_in_server_code"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "threading.Thread created in server-side code without daemon=True, which can block graceful shutdown."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
